Applications Open for the Earthquake Disaster Science Program Coordinator Position

The Turkish–Japanese Science and Technology University is now accepting applications for the Earthquake Disaster Science Program Coordinator position. Applicants should submit their applications via the university’s Vacant Positions page.

for vacant positions.
